name: hello-vault
description: End-to-end demo: unwraps a secret_id at boot, logs into Vault via AppRole, reads a KV secret, and echoes it. Bind a VaultAppRole in the Application settings before deploying.

parameters.name: kv-path
parameters.description: KV v2 secret path (under secret/data/) to read and echo

command: set -eu; echo 'Unwrapping secret_id at '$VAULT_ADDR; SECRET_ID=$(curl -fsS -X POST -H "X-Vault-Token: $VAULT_WRAPPED_SECRET_ID" $VAULT_ADDR/v1/sys/wrapping/unwrap | sed -n 's/.*"secret_id":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); echo 'Logging in via AppRole'; TOKEN=$(curl -fsS -X POST -d '{"role_id":"'$VAULT_ROLE_ID'","secret_id":"'$SECRET_ID'"}' $VAULT_ADDR/v1/auth/approle/login | sed -n 's/.*"client_token":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); echo 'Reading secret/data/{{params.kv-path}}'; SECRET=$(curl -fsS -H "X-Vault-Token: $TOKEN" $VAULT_ADDR/v1/secret/data/{{params.kv-path}}); echo "Secret payload: $SECRET"; echo 'Idling'; while true; do sleep 30; done
